# visitor_management.checked_out
The **Visitor Management Checked Out** event is triggered when a visitor checks out.

## Prerequisites

* The [**Visitor Management**](https://support.zoom.com/hc/en?id=zm_kb&sysparm_article=KB0057564) feature enabled by your organization.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Visitor Management Checked Out** subscription enabled under the **Visitor Management** event.

# workspace.user_unassigned
The **Workspace User Unassigned** event is triggered every time a user is unassigned from a Workspace in your account. Admins and account owners can unassign a user from Workspace in you account. The Workspace can be unassign users using the [Delete a desk assignment API](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rest/reference/zoom-rooms/methods/#operation/Deleteadeskassignment) or by deleting the Workspace' assignment using the Zoom Web Portal itself.

## Prerequisites

* The **Workspace Reservation** feature enabled by your organization through a Zoom Rooms license, Zoom Phone Common Area Phone license or Workspace Reservation license.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Workspace User Unassigned** subscription enabled under the **Workspace** event.


**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `workspace:read:admin`,`workspace:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `workspace:read:assignment`,`workspace:read:assignment:admin`

# zoomroom.sensor_data

The **Zoom Room Sensor Data** event triggers every five minutes when a Zoom Room device sensor reports data.

## Prerequisites

* A Business or Enterprise plan.
* The ability to detect the room air conditions, a feature available with Zoom Rooms version 5.5.0 or later. Not supported for Mac and Windows Zoom Rooms or Windows Controller.
* Count the number of people in room: available on Zoom Rooms clients versions 5.5.0 (Windows), 5.5.0 (Mac), 5.6.6 (Android), 5.5.0 (iOS Controller), 5.5.0 (Android Controller) or later.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Room Sensor Data** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Room** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_rooms:read:sensor_data:admin`

**Event type**: `zoomroom.sensor_data`

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

date_time.description: The time when the sensor data was reported.

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

date_time.description: The time when the sensor data was reported.

# zoomroom.alert

The **Zoom Room Alert** event is triggered when there is an issue with a Zoom Room on a Zoom account that has installed your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app. Some of the issues that can trigger this event are:

* High CPU usage.
* Low battery, charging, and/or connection issues in a Zoom Room device.
* Room controller, camera, or speaker disconnections or reconnections.
* Missing camera or microphone.

It is recommended that you **only** subscribe to either the **Zoom Room Alert** event or the **Zoom Room Delayed Alert** event to avoid receiving duplicate event notifications.

## Prerequisites

* A Business or Enterprise plan.
* The administrator or account owner must enable the [**Zoom Room Alert**](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/205394099-Zoom-Room-Alerts) feature with the selected alerts in the [Zoom Web Portal](https://zoom.us/location).
* The Zoom Room version must be 3.5.24524.0821 and higher.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Room Alert** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Room** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_rooms:read:alert:admin`

**Event type**: `zoomroom.alert`

# workspace.reservation_update

The **Workspace Reservation Updated** event is triggered when a user updates their [Workspace reservation](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/4417951085965-Using-Workspace-Reservation-Beta-for-Zoom-Rooms).

  * Android version 5.9.0.3502 or higher
  * iOS version 5.9.0 or higher
* [Zoom Rooms for Touch devices](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/115004773103), version 5.9.0 or higher (*Optional*).
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:

	* The **Workspace Reservation Updated** subscription enabled under the **Workspace Reservation** event.

# zoomroom.checked_in

The **Zoom Room Checked In** event is triggered when a user [checks in](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360001147163-Using-the-Zoom-Rooms-check-in-feature) to confirm that they will be using the Zoom Room for a certain period of time.

Users can check in manually via the Zoom Room controller or the scheduling display, or they can check in programmatically using the [**Check-in or check-out of a Zoom Room**](/api-reference/zoom-api/methods#operation/checkInRooms) API. Users can also check in to the Zoom Room by starting a scheduled meeting, using the whiteboard feature or making a phone call from the Zoom Room.

**Note** Only scheduled meetings will trigger a webhook.


## Prerequisites

* The administrator or account owner must enable the [**Room Check-In and Check-Out**](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360001147163-Using-the-Zoom-Rooms-check-in-feature) feature.
* The Zoom Room version must be 4.1.27694.0702 or higher.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Room Checked In** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Room** event.












**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_rooms:read:room:admin`

**Event type**: `zoomroom.checked_in`

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

email.description: The Zoom Room's associated email address.

event_id.description:
The unique ID of the Zoom Room's associated calendar event:

* For Microsoft Exchange calendar integration, use Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). The event_id value is the Id value in the ItemId element of the FindItem operation's response. 
* For Google Calendar integration, use Google's [Events: list API](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events/list). The event_id value is the id field in the [events resource](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events#resource).

change_key.description:
The specific version of the calendar item. You can get this value using Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). Refer to the ChangeKey field of the ItemId element in the operation's response.

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

resource_email.description:
The calendar's associated [resource mailbox](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/10063/creating-and-managing-resource-mailboxes-in-office-365).

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

calendar_type.description:
The calendar's type: 
* 0 — Google Calendar. 
* 1 — Office 365 Calendar. 
* 2 — Microsoft Exchange Calendar.

api_type.description:
The API type: 
* 0 — [Exchange Web Services (EWS) API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/ews-managed-api-reference-for-exchange) 
* 1 — [Microsoft Graph API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/develop/microsoft-graph-intro) 
* An empty string — The API returns this value when the calendar_type value is 0 (Google Calendar).

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

email.description: The Zoom Room's associated email address.

event_id.description:
The unique ID of the Zoom Room's associated calendar event:

* For Microsoft Exchange calendar integration, use Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). The event_id value is the Id value in the ItemId element of the FindItem operation's response. 
* For Google Calendar integration, use Google's [Events: list API](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events/list). The event_id value is the id field in the [events resource](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events#resource).

change_key.description:
The specific version of the calendar item. You can get this value using Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). Refer to the ChangeKey field of the ItemId element in the operation's response.

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

resource_email.description:
The calendar's associated [resource mailbox](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/10063/creating-and-managing-resource-mailboxes-in-office-365).

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

calendar_type.description:
The calendar's type: 
* 0 — Google Calendar. 
* 1 — Office 365 Calendar. 
* 2 — Microsoft Exchange Calendar.

api_type.description:
The API type: 
* 0 — [Exchange Web Services (EWS) API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/ews-managed-api-reference-for-exchange) 
* 1 — [Microsoft Graph API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/develop/microsoft-graph-intro) 
* An empty string — The API returns this value when the calendar_type value is 0 (Google Calendar).

# workspace.reservation_checked_in

The **Workspace Reservation Checked In** event is triggered when a user checks in their [Workspace reservation](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/4417951085965-Using-Workspace-Reservation-Beta-for-Zoom-Rooms) to confirm that they will be using a Zoom Room or Zoom device-enabled desk.

# zoomroom.checked_out

The **Zoom Room Checked Out** event is triggered when a user checks out of the Zoom Room to confirm that they are releasing the room for other users to use.

Users can check out manually via the Zoom Room controller or the scheduling display, or they can check out programmatically using the [**Check-in or check-out of a Zoom Room**](/api-reference/zoom-api/methods#operation/checkInRooms) API.

## Prerequisites

* The administrator or account owner must enable the [**Room Check-In and Check-Out**](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360001147163-Using-the-Zoom-Rooms-check-in-feature) feature.
* The Zoom Room version must be 4.7.0 or higher.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Room Checked Out** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Room** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_rooms:read:room:admin`

**Event type**: `zoomroom.checked_out`

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

email.description: The Zoom Room's associated email address.

event_id.description:
The unique ID of the Zoom Room's associated calendar event:

* For Microsoft Exchange calendar integration, use Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). The event_id value is the Id value in the ItemId element of the FindItem operation's response. 
* For Google Calendar integration, use Google's [Events: list API](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events/list). The event_id value is the id field in the [events resource](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events#resource).

change_key.description:
The specific version of the calendar item. You can get this value using Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). Refer to the ChangeKey field of the ItemId element in the operation's response.

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

resource_email.description:
The calendar's associated [resource mailbox](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/10063/creating-and-managing-resource-mailboxes-in-office-365).

This field is only returned for Microsoft Exchange or Office 365 calendars.

calendar_type.description:
The calendar's type: 
* 0 — Google Calendar. 
* 1 — Office 365 Calendar. 
* 2 — Microsoft Exchange Calendar.

api_type.description:
The API type: 
* 0 — [Exchange Web Services (EWS) API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/ews-managed-api-reference-for-exchange) 
* 1 — [Microsoft Graph API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/develop/microsoft-graph-intro) 
* An empty string — The API returns this value when the calendar_type value is 0 (Google Calendar).

email.description: The Zoom Room's associated email address.

event_id.description:
The unique ID of the Zoom Room's associated calendar event:

* For Microsoft Exchange calendar integration, use Microsoft's [FindItem operation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/exchange/client-developer/web-service-reference/finditem-operation). The event_id value is the Id value in the ItemId element of the FindItem operation's response. 
* For Google Calendar integration, use Google's [Events: list API](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events/list). The event_id value is the id field in the [events resource](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api/v3/reference/events#resource).

# zoomroom.delayed_alert

The **Zoom Room Delayed Alert** event is triggered when there is an issue with a Zoom Room on a Zoom account that has installed your [webhook-enabled](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/webhook-reference#enable-webhooks) app. Some of the issues that can trigger this event are:

* High CPU usage.
* Low battery, charging, and/or connection issues in a Zoom Room device.
* Room controller, camera, or speaker disconnections or reconnections.
* Missing camera or microphone.

This event notification is the same as the **Zoom Room Alert** event notification. However, instead of receiving the event in near real-time, you will receive this event notification **five minutes after an issue occurs in the Zoom Room**.

It is recommended that you **only** subscribe to either the **Zoom Room Alert** event or the **Zoom Room Delayed Alert** event to avoid receiving duplicate event notifications.

## Prerequisites

* A Business or Enterprise plan.
* The administrator or account owner must enable the [**Zoom Room Alert**](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/205394099-Zoom-Room-Alerts) feature with the selected alerts in the [Zoom Web Portal](https://zoom.us/location).
* The Zoom Room version must be 3.5.24524.0821 and higher.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Room Delayed Alert** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Room** event.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zoom_rooms:read:alert:admin`

**Event type**: `zoomroom.delayed_alert`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

email.description: The Zoom Room's associated email address.

issue.description:
The issues that occurred during the meeting: 
* Room controller is disconnected. 
* Room controller connected. 
* Selected camera is disconnected. 
* Selected camera is reconnected. 
* Selected microphone is disconnected. 
* Selected microphone is reconnected. 
* Selected speaker is disconnected. 
* Selected speaker is reconnected. 
* Zoom room is offline. 
* Zoom room is online. 
* High CPU usage detected. 
* Low bandwidth network is detected. 
* {name} battery is low. 
* {name} battery is normal. 
* {name} disconnected. 
* {name} is connected.
* Incorrect Room Passcode Entry Detected. 
* The possible values for {name} are: 
* Zoom Rooms Computer. 
* Controller. 
* Scheduling Display. 
*

alert_type.description:
The type of alert sent: 
* 1 — The controller or scheduling display disconnected.

# workspace.deleted
The **Workspace Deleted** event is triggered every time a Workspace is deleted in your account. Admins and account owners can delete a Workspaces to an account. The Workspace can be deleted using the [Delete a Workspace API](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rest/reference/zoom-rooms/methods/#operation/deleteWorkspace) or by deleting the Workspace using the Zoom Web Portal itself.

## Prerequisites

* The **Workspace Reservation** feature enabled by your organization through a Zoom Rooms license, Zoom Phone Common Area Phone license or Workspace Reservation license.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Workspace Deleted** subscription enabled under the **Workspace** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `workspace:read:admin`,`workspace:write:admin`,`workspace:read`,`workspace:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `workspace:read:workspace`,`workspace:read:workspace:admin`

**Event type**: `workspace.deleted`

event_ts.description: A timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who deleted the Workspace.

# zoomroom.location_created
The **Zoom Rooms location has been created** event is triggered every time a new Zoom Room location is created in your account. Admins and account owners can add new Zoom Room Location to an account. The Location can be added using the [Add a Zoom Rooms Location API](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rest/reference/zoom-rooms/methods/#operation/addAZRLocation) or by adding the Zoom Room Location using the Zoom Web Portal itself.

## Prerequisites

* Have your organization enable the **Zoom Rooms** feature through a Zoom Rooms license, or Workspace Reservation feature enabled by your organization through a Zoom Rooms license, Zoom Phone Common Area Phone license or **Workspace Reservation** license.
* Enable **Event Subscriptions** for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**.
	* The **Zoom Rooms Location Created** subscription enabled under the **Zoom Rooms** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `room:write:admin`
